name: dgxsparklabs-marketplace
description: Curated agent skills, rules, and reference plugins for Claude Code, plus auto-generated mirrors for Devin, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.

metadata.description: Curated agent skills, rules, and reference plugins for Claude Code, plus auto-generated mirrors for Devin, Cursor, Windsurf, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.

plugins.name: example-agent
plugins.description: Reference template for a sub-agent plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-command
plugins.description: Reference template for a slash command plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-hook
plugins.description: Reference template for a hook plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-lsp
plugins.description: Reference template for an LSP server plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-mcp
plugins.description: Reference template for an MCP server plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-monitor
plugins.description: Reference template for a background monitor plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-output-style
plugins.description: Reference template for an output style plugin — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-rule
plugins.description: Reference template for a rule plugin — ships rule content + activate.sh symlink helper. Copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-skill
plugins.description: Reference template for a Claude Code skill plugin — copy this directory to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: example-theme
plugins.description: Reference template for a theme plugin (experimental) — copy to scaffold your own.

plugins.name: rules-all
plugins.description: Every rule in this marketplace, bundled. Auto-installs all rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply, or use activate-installed-rules.sh at the repo root.

plugins.name: rules-documentation
plugins.description: Tracking work, documenting decisions, maintaining project history (auto-installs member rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply)

plugins.name: rules-environment
plugins.description: Tooling conventions and output discipline (auto-installs member rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply)

plugins.name: rules-notifications
plugins.description: Alert hooks for important events (auto-installs member rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply)

plugins.name: rules-quality
plugins.description: Code quality, testing, verification, and review discipline (auto-installs member rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply)

plugins.name: rules-workflow
plugins.description: How agents approach, decompose, and execute tasks (auto-installs member rule plugins; each requires activate.sh to apply)

plugins.name: skill-act-runner
plugins.description: Run GitHub Actions workflows locally with act and podman

plugins.name: skill-check
plugins.description: Mid-session course correction — stop, review rules, and realign

plugins.name: skill-code-health-audit
plugins.description: Audit codebase for DRY violations, oversized files, and scattered definitions

plugins.name: skill-duckduckgo-search
plugins.description: Search DuckDuckGo and return results as structured text

plugins.name: skill-expose-port
plugins.description: Expose a local port via HTTPS (localhost.run) or TCP (bore)

plugins.name: skill-gemini-chat
plugins.description: Interactive multi-turn chat with Google Gemini

plugins.name: skill-github-repo-setup
plugins.description: Create a GitHub repo with CI, branch protection, and naming rules

plugins.name: skill-github-search
plugins.description: Search GitHub for repositories, prior art, and implementation inspiration

plugins.name: skill-google-drive-reader
plugins.description: Read Google Docs from personal Drive, extract URLs and conclusions

plugins.name: skill-motivation
plugins.description: Completeness checker — report what's actually unfinished before stopping

plugins.name: skill-pitfall-check
plugins.description: Search PITFALLS.md and git log for known issues before starting work

plugins.name: skill-project-bootstrap
plugins.description: Initialize project docs — AGENTS.md, HANDOFF.md, CHANGELOG.md, PITFALLS.md

plugins.name: skill-recall-rules
plugins.description: Re-read global rules and thinking framework to realign mid-session

plugins.name: skill-send-email
plugins.description: Send an email to someone using the Resend API

plugins.name: skill-session-history
plugins.description: Query past Devin CLI conversations from the local session database

plugins.name: skill-session-wrapup
plugins.description: End-of-session audit — check docs, commits, and readiness for the next agent

plugins.name: skill-skill-analytics
plugins.description: Analyze skill usage patterns and generate an interactive HTML dashboard

plugins.name: skill-skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, and iteratively improve agent skills with evals

plugins.name: skill-ssh-tunnel
plugins.description: Set up SSH port forwarding tunnels (local, remote, SOCKS proxy)

plugins.name: skill-structured-handoff
plugins.description: Generate structured task files for autonomous agent sessions

plugins.name: skill-sync-rules
plugins.description: Sync rules from global AI agent configs into the workspace

plugins.name: skill-telegram-notify
plugins.description: Send a Telegram notification with a task summary

plugins.name: skill-textual-tui-guide
plugins.description: Build rich terminal UIs with Python Textual — layouts, widgets, modals, styling

plugins.name: skill-web-scraper
plugins.description: Fetch a web page and extract its main content as clean readable text

plugins.name: skill-youtube-search
plugins.description: Search YouTube for technical videos, tutorials, and talks on a topic

plugins.name: skill-youtube-wisdom
plugins.description: Extract key knowledge from a YouTube video transcript

plugins.name: skills-ai-services
plugins.description: External AI APIs and cloud service integrations

plugins.name: skills-code-analysis
plugins.description: Codebase audits and domain-specific reference guides

plugins.name: skills-communication
plugins.description: Send emails, messages, and notifications

plugins.name: skills-devops
plugins.description: CI/CD, repository setup, port tunneling, infrastructure tools

plugins.name: skills-meta-tooling
plugins.description: Skill creation, analytics, and configuration synchronization

plugins.name: skills-project-scaffolding
plugins.description: Initialize project documentation and structured handoffs

plugins.name: skills-search-research
plugins.description: Find information across web, code repos, and video

plugins.name: skills-session-management
plugins.description: Mid-session realignment, motivation, recall, history, audits
